productDisplayName: Flying Machine Men Casual Green Casual Shoes
description: An eclectic fusion of hot style and cutting edge design, this shoe from flying machine is a great way to attain a cult status. Made with a canvas and mesh upper, this is a must-have in your casual wardrobe.UpperCanvas upper with mesh panels for absolute breathable comfort Synthetic leather panels on the sides of the midfoot for added shoe structurePadded tongue and collar with a fabric inner lining for sweat-free comfortCushioned footbed with a fabric lining for sweat-free comfort and impact-protectionLace-up system for a snug, customised FitMidsolePhylon midsole for absolute impact protectionOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with strategic grooves on the forefoot, midfoot and backheel for absolute grip and tractionShoe careClean the mesh panels and synthetic leather patch using a damp, clean clothTo clean the canvas, make a paste using 1 tbsp of baking soda, 1 tbsp white vinegar and 1 tbsp hot water. Rub this paste onto the canvas and the sole using a brush. Wash off with lukewarm water.
